caption: A man with glasses and dark hair tied back performs while standing in front of a light-colored slatted wall. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest adorned with intricate blue and white embroidery and a decorative red and white beaded necklace. He holds an acoustic guitar and sings into a black microphone on a stand. In the foreground, the tops of heads of audience members are visible. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of each frame. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth as he sings, while his hands continue to play the guitar. The lighting and background remain constant across the duration of the clip.
